title.en: But offending such a strong man is not a good t...

content.en:
Aoi is also very jealous of Ye Tian, fortunately, everyone is now the emperor list powerhouse of the main department of Ah Luo, and it is impossible for Ye Tian to make a move against him.

But offending such a strong man is not a good thing for him.

He was very curious, what level Ye Tian's strength had reached, it was estimated that it would not be long before Ye Tian's ranking would continue to improve, and he would finally be locked to a specific ranking by the Emperor List.

After all, the emperor list can judge the strength of the emperor list, and it can only be honed and calculated after many battles, and it can't be seen in just a few ~ battles.

But.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian didn't go out, he practiced penance in the Aromu Fortress, striving to comprehend the ultimate rule-realm as soon as possible.

At the same time, the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is coming, and everyone is waiting for the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, so as to understand the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, naturally they don't want to go out, in case something happens, it will be a waste of this opportunity.

Time passes.

Finally, on this day, the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is about to appear, which is the main department of the Mother of Arrow, which paid a huge price to extract a wisp of the power of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space and turn it into a projection, for the strong people of the Emperor List of the Mother of Arrow to come to the understanding.

this day.

In the fortress of Arromu, in a majestic void.

One figure after another appeared, and it was the three hundred and sixty-five emperor list powerhouses on the emperor list, they arrived one by one, and they almost knew each other.

Ye Tian also came, and the other emperor powerhouses didn't know Ye Tian, so they all looked over.

Ye Tian also looked at these emperor powerhouses and recognized the two of them, Aoi and Wei,

For these two defeated men, he just glanced at them and didn't care.

Of course, the other Emperor List powerhouses didn't pay much attention to Ye Tian.

One by one, they sat cross-legged, waiting for the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space to come.

Suddenly.

The arrival of a strong man on the emperor list attracted a group of strong people on the emperor list, and they stepped forward to say hello.

Ye Tian recognized the other party at a glance.

The third place on the Emperor List of Aromu Fortress - Mo Yan!

Being able to rank third on the Emperor List shows how strong this Mo Yan's strength is, maybe it should be very easy to break through to the ancient demon level.

But such a strong man on the emperor list is not in a hurry to break through, one is for the main department, and the other is to get more benefits.

After all, once you break through to the Ancient Demon Level, you can't enjoy the benefits of the Emperor List, such as the opportunity to comprehend the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, then you can't get it.

Soon, the second powerhouse of the emperor list, Taihori, also came.

However, from beginning to end, the powerhouse who was number one on the emperor list did not come.

And at this moment, some of the emperor's powerhouses are also discussing the first place in the emperor's list,

"Amusha, who is number one on the emperor's list, still hasn't come. "

"The other party should have given up cultivation, he cultivated three top-notch form secret methods, and all of them cultivated to the second level of perfection, resulting in an extremely low probability of breaking through the ancient demon level, even if it was an ultimate ancient demon to help her break through, she still failed to break through! That is, the ultimate ancient demon protected her, so that he did not fall, but it is estimated that he will never be able to break through. "

"Yes, she has comprehended the space-time ancient demon pillar projection many times, and for her, the stronger the strength, the better it is, it is not necessarily a good thing, so she gave up!"

"I have to say that Amusa is indeed terrifying, even if it is the first place in the emperor list of many fortresses such as Dom Fortress, it can't beat Amusha, but unfortunately it can't break through to an ancient demon-level existence, and it will be completely surpassed by us in the future, but what's the use of being the first on the emperor list for a lifetime?"

Listening to the discussion of these Emperor List powerhouses, Ye Tian knew about the situation of this Amusha, his strength was against the sky, but because he had cultivated too many form secret methods, he could not break through to the ancient demon level.

But such a demon, why do you practice so many secret methods, it's really a bit weird, and she can let the ultimate ancient demon help her break through, it seems that her identity is not simple, it shouldn't be ignorance!

Ye Tian didn't think too much about it, after all, people had nothing to do with him.

Rumble!!!!

Suddenly, the void shook.

Immediately after, an unimaginably huge projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar descended, enveloping this side of the void.

This is the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, and just one projection triggers the vibration of the ultimate particles of endless time and space.

Now.

Many Emperor List powerhouses have begun to comprehend this space-time ancient demon pillar projection, after all, this projection has not existed for a long time, if you don't seize the time to comprehend, it will be too unworthy.

Ye Tian also immediately comprehended the space-time ancient magic pillar projection, and after just a moment of comprehension, he immediately sensed the value of this space-time ancient magic pillar projection, which was simply incredible.

It seems to be the origin of everything, containing all the powers, and even if you comprehend the rudiments of the realm of ultimate rules, or perceive the patterns of life, or create the ultimate arcane, you can be inspired by it.

You can even use the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space to cultivate the secret form.

In short, the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space is undoubtedly an excellent opportunity, and the first time to comprehend the best effect.

At present, for him, Enlightenment Ultimate Rule Realm is undoubtedly the best choice, which can greatly improve his strength.

So, with all his might, he began to comprehend the realm of ultimate rules.

Time passed gradually, and Ye Tian gradually realized the true ultimate rule realm with the help of the space-time ancient demon pillar, that is, his own Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rule Realm.

In an instant, his comprehension of the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws reached an incredible level, and the strength of the whole person also reached a metamorphosis.

And he comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm, the power of the realm was completely controlled by himself, and no breath was leaked, and the other Emperor List powerhouses were all comprehending the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, so they didn't care about the situation on his side, and they didn't know that he had comprehended the Ultimate Rule Realm.

"It's done, I have comprehended the realm of the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws, and with my current strength, I definitely have the strength comparable to the number one on the emperor list. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, as for whether he can beat the first place on the emperor list, it's hard to say, after all, he hasn't really fought against the first place on the emperor list.

After comprehending the Ultimate Rule Realm, he did not continue to comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm, and wanted to comprehend the Ultimate Rule Realm from the beginner to the Xiaocheng realm, which was naturally not something he could do now.

Therefore, he was going to cultivate the True Lin Form, and if he could cultivate the second form to the Xiaocheng and Dacheng realms, his strength would also increase a lot.

So, he began to cultivate the True Lin Form and.
